mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_friend (user_id, friend_id, deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, FALSE, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, friend_id) DO UPDATE SET deleted = FALSE, create_time = EXCLUDED.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_friend WHERE ((user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (user_id = #{friendId} AND friend_id = #{userId})) AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
